stemHtml: VFR between 4500 ft and 9000 ft AMSL outside controlled airspace — minimum cloud distance and visibility?

options.a: 1500 m horizontal, 1000 ft vertical, 5 km visibility.
options.b: 1500 m horizontal, 1000 ft vertical, 8 km visibility.
options.c: 1000 m horizontal, 1000 ft vertical, 5 km visibility.
options.d: 600 m horizontal, 1000 ft vertical, 5 km visibility.
